as_is_applicable_entities: Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional Rural Banks)
Housing Finance Companies (in aligned contexts where applicable via NHB/RBI guidance)
Banks engaged in housing finance lending activities

chapter_or_section_wise_applicability.reason: The circular is explicitly issued for Scheduled Commercial Banks engaged in housing finance lending. HDFC AMC is an Asset Management Company and does not undertake lending activities.

chapter_or_section_wise_applicability.chapter_or_section_title: Acquisition of Land (Loan for Plot Purchase)
chapter_or_section_wise_applicability.reason: This section governs lending conditions for banks financing land purchase. HDFC AMC does not originate loans or finance property acquisition.
Applies to banks providing housing loans and managing disbursement, certification, and borrower compliance. AMC has no such credit exposure role.
Restriction applies to lenders. AMC may invest in securities linked to real estate but does not directly finance properties.

chapter_or_section_wise_applicability.chapter_or_section_title: Quantum of Loan – LTV Ratios and Risk Weights
chapter_or_section_wise_applicability.reason: LTV and risk weight norms are prudential lending requirements applicable to banks’ balance sheet exposures, not to pooled investment vehicles.

While direct lending norms do not apply, AMC funds investing in real estate-linked instruments (e.g., REITs, debt securities of real estate companies) may be indirectly impacted through market risk and SEBI-imposed exposure limits.
PSL targets are applicable only to banks. AMC has no statutory lending targets.
Applies to loan lifecycle management in banks. AMC does not disburse or monitor loans.
Although RBI norms do not directly apply, similar risk principles (concentration, exposure limits, asset quality) are enforced on AMC via SEBI Mutual Fund Regulations.

applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: Circular applies only to banks engaged in housing finance lending
applicable_parameters.reason: HDFC AMC is a capital markets intermediary and not a lending institution

applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: Entity must originate or service housing loans
applicable_parameters.reason: AMC manages pooled investments and does not originate loans

applicable_parameters.parameter: On-book credit exposure to real estate
applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: LTV and risk weights apply to lender balance sheet
applicable_parameters.reason: AMC does not carry loans on balance sheet

applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: Exposure through debt/equity instruments of real estate sector
applicable_parameters.reason: AMC funds may invest in real estate companies or REITs, creating indirect exposure

applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: RBI regulates banks/NBFCs; SEBI regulates AMCs
applicable_parameters.reason: AMC governed by SEBI, but macro-prudential signals from RBI influence market and risk environment

applicable_parameters.condition_or_rule: Similar prudential principles applied via SEBI MF regulations
applicable_parameters.reason: Though not RBI-driven, equivalent controls exist under SEBI

assumptions.detail: Assumed RBI Master Circular on Housing Finance applicable to Scheduled Commercial Banks only
Does not undertake lending, only manages mutual fund investments
AMC may have indirect exposure via securities but not direct lending exposure
RBI circulars may influence market conditions but are not directly binding on AMC
